displayName: Merged Stage Execution by Fleet and Pad
description: Global average score grouped by the fleet and pad equivalent of well family.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
  s.fleet_name,
  s.pad_name,
  s.fleet_name || ' / ' || s.pad_name AS family_name,
  ROUND(AVG(s.composite_score)::numeric, 1) AS average_score,
  COUNT(*)::bigint AS stage_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.name)::bigint AS well_count,
  CASE
    WHEN AVG(s.composite_score) >= 70 THEN '#2A9D6F'
    WHEN AVG(s.composite_score) >= 45 THEN '#E6A23C'
    ELSE '#D9534F'
  END AS color
FROM featurestore:merged_stage_execution_scores_v1 s
WHERE s.formula_version = :formula_version
AND s.normalization_version = :normalization_version
GROUP BY s.fleet_name, s.pad_name
ORDER BY average_score, family_name
) q
